name: Canal Street Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, salt, and baking powder; set aside.
2. Beat eggs well; gradually blend in sugar. Beat in margarine, then Redi-Blend, and blend in the flour mixture. Stir in nuts and vanilla.
3. Pour into a greased 8-inch square pan and bake at 350°F for about 25 minutes.
4. Cool in the pan; then cut into squares. Makes about 20 brownies.
